_comment: Countryside wardrobe pack. Internal pack id remains rural; public style maps to Countryside.

packStyle.name: 郊區鄉村 Countryside Wardrobe
packStyle.reference: simple natural durable medieval countryside clothing for villages, pastures, mills, gardens and cottages; princess travelling incognito or on a rural adventure
packStyle.linework: loose, light, shorter skirts for movement, simple warm decoration
packStyle.mood: natural, plain, friendly, warm, free, everyday
